feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Init Portfolio
entry.content:
My first blog post! :)

After procrastinating for so long I finally sat down and made the portfolio I’ve been thinking so long about. Well it’s at least a start. Hopefully, this is the start of something new and consistent. I want to try and create posts to summarize what I’ve learned especially in ML and AI.

Still a lot of work to do on this portfolio but it’s a start…
